ksa_text: Skill in developing AI system documentation and technical specifications, including creating model cards, system cards, datasheets, documenting system context and intended use, and producing documentation meeting regulatory compliance standards for EU AI Act and NIST AI RMF.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-S-005 (AI Governance/Skill) scores 0.629 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.629). Scope is in_scope for SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer: 3 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with in_scope scope, AI Governance, composite 0.629. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support AI Governance for SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: AI Governance appears in approximately 78% of SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer job postings. AI governance in SaMD is an increasingly required competency per IMDRF and FDA AI/ML guidance.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. AI Governance is market-validated for SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer. Final decision: include.
